description: Extract plain text + headings from Google Docs by ID via a service account. Works with an explicit list of doc_ids OR upstream of google_drive_ingestion (filter Drive to application/vnd.google-apps.document, feed IDs here).

outputs.description: One row per Doc with id, title, word_count, plus optional `text` and `headings` columns.

credentials_path.label: Credentials Path
credentials_path.description: Path to service-account JSON. Falls back to GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.

doc_ids.label: Doc IDs
doc_ids.description: Explicit list of Google Doc IDs. Mutually exclusive with upstream_asset_key.

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream DataFrame asset. Each row's id_column value is treated as a Doc ID.

id_column.label: ID Column
id_column.description: Column with the Doc IDs in the upstream DataFrame.

name: Google Docs Extractor
